title: Function-Tunnel Intelligence (FTI): Elastic Structural Runtime Intelligence for Robust Autonomous Systems
description: Function Tunnel Intelligence (FTI) is a structural intelligence framework investigating tunnel-constrained evolution, trajectory-preserved derivation, and feasible structural transformation. This repository explores how stable evolution may emerge inside CCC-preserved functional tunnels rather than through arbitrary mutation. The project includes canonical FTI architectures, Elastic Structural Runtime concepts, trajectory reasoning frameworks, preservation-aware runtime MVPs, and future directions such as CCC-Preserved Generation (CPG) and Core-CCC-Preserved Analysis (CPA). These directions investigate explicit structural preservation, policy-preserved derivation, and future AI architectures beyond purely probabilistic continuation systems.
